some of these statements that are made. And it's pretty awesome when you consider all of that and
the manner by which these blessings are given. Remember in verse 28 the Bible says,
all these are the twelve tribes of Israel and this is that their father spake unto them. And bless

begin in verse number 20. The Bible says, out of Asher his bread shall be fat and he shall yield

the inheritance for the descendants of Asher was the seacoast area that was north of Mount Carmel.
